capabilities: Combine DAG construction techniques with architectural principles to enhance task planning and execution efficiency.

procedure.action: Execute topological sort on task dependencies to identify execution order using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke graph-based algorithms to detect cycles and ensure acyclic properties by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Reconcile task dependency graphs with architecture components using adjacency lists by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Assert merged graph structure by running test cases on sample task sets by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Assign tasks based on dependency levels and assign execution priorities using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.

summary: Integrate task dependency DAG construction with software architecture insights to optimize task planning and execution. Merge workflows and validate outputs for efficient task management.
title: Directed Acyclic Graph Construction for Task Dependencies

failureConditions: Cyclic dependencies cause execution deadlocks; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Incorrect task prioritization leads to inefficient execution; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Merged graph contains invalid nodes or edges; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Task execution order violates dependency constraints; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: merged graph structure by running test cases on sample task sets by asserting all required fields conform to the schema
successConditions: Run cycle detection algorithm and confirm no cycles exist; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check task execution logs to ensure order matches topological sort; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Validate merged graph against predefined architecture constraints; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Test task execution with sample data to ensure correct prioritization; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
